name: Crockpot Chicken & Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Saute onion and garlic until light brown, then remove from the pan.
3. Brown sausage and chicken separately in the same skillet.
4. Drain excess fat and pat dry with paper towels.
5. In a crockpot, combine all remaining ingredients with the onions and garlic.
6. Add sausage on top of the mixture, followed by chicken breasts.
7. Cover and cook on low setting for 6-8 hours.
